title: My Garden
content:
A garden is a lovesome thing, God wot!
    Rose plot,
    Fringed pool,
    Ferned grot,
    The veriest school
    Of peace; and yet the fool
    Contends that God is not,
    Not God! in gardens! when the eve is cool?
    Nay, but I have a sign;
    'Tis very sure God walks in mine.
meaning:
Exploring the themes of classic, Thomas Edward Brown delivers a powerful performance in "My Garden"...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
